stem: A HR analytics study surveys 50 staff members and observes 6 positive outcomes out of 50 (12.0%). Estimate the true employee turnover rate and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.12. Wilson 95% CI: [0.0562, 0.2381]. Point estimate: 0.1471.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
